overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a spacecraft flying at high velocity through a surreal green nebula environment. The ship approaches and navigates around a large gray planetoid while emitting purple engine trails, with colorful warp speed lines indicating rapid movement through open space.

scene_state.functional_zone: open nebula space with distant planetoid

agents.ego_description: piloting the spacecraft straight forward through the green nebula toward the distant planetoid

entered.detail: large gray cratered planet or moon visible in the distance against the bright green nebula

segments.scene_description: The spacecraft flies through a vivid green nebula environment with glowing purple engine thrusters visible. A large gray planetoid looms ahead in the distance while colorful speed lines streak past the camera. The ship maintains a steady course through the open cosmic environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: close planetary approach in nebula space

events.description: spacecraft banks slightly left to navigate around the large planetoid

agents.ego_description: banking left to navigate around the massive planetoid while maintaining high velocity through the nebula

segments.scene_description: The spacecraft closes distance to the planetoid, which now dominates the left side of the frame with its detailed cratered surface. The ship banks slightly to curve around the planetary body as it passes by on the left. The green nebula background and speed lines continue to indicate rapid forward motion through space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a spacecraft as it accelerates through a vivid green nebula toward a massive, looming planetoid. It begins with the ship maintaining a steady course through the open cosmic environment, leaving glowing purple engine trails while colorful speed lines streak past the camera. As the spacecraft closes the distance, the distant gray sphere expands to dominate the left side of the frame, revealing a detailed, cratered surface. The camera then banks slightly to follow the ship as it curves around the planetary body, maintaining its rapid forward motion against the backdrop of the glowing nebula.
